description: A specific page in the application is consistently slow to load due to an inefficient database query.

nodes.task_description: Use an APM tool to identify the slow transaction and the corresponding database query.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent pinpoints the exact query causing the slowdown.

nodes.task_description: Analyze the query plan and identify a missing database index as the cause of the poor performance.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent correctly diagnoses the need for an index.

nodes.task_description: Create a ticket for the DBA team to add the necessary index to the database table.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent creates an actionable ticket to resolve the performance issue.
